steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal explicitly asks for the cup's name in Choctaw. The notes supply it: isht ishko. The correct choice must include that specific term.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: mentions the cup without providing its Choctaw name. ✗
  • Choice B — 'includes isht ishko': provides the Choctaw name, fulfilling the goal exactly. ✓
  • Choice C: skips the cup or omits the name. ✗
  • Choice D: skips the cup or omits the name. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
